summary: Screen a clinical guideline or care pathway for evidence quality, safety constraints, and implementation readiness before clinician review.

inputs.name: guideline_document
inputs.description: The clinical guideline or care pathway to review.

inputs.name: evidence_set
inputs.description: Supporting evidence, references, or systematic review data.

inputs.name: safety_constraints
inputs.description: Known contraindications, patient safety requirements, or regulatory constraints.

outputs.name: evidence_quality_report
outputs.description: Evidence grading using recognized levels (e.g., GRADE, Oxford CEBM).

outputs.name: safety_flags
outputs.description: Safety concerns, contraindications, or missing safety language.

outputs.name: clinician_handoff
outputs.description: Summary with unresolved questions for clinician or committee review.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is clinical guideline support, not diagnosis or prescription.
Require the guideline document and evidence set before grading.
Verify no PHI is present in inputs or outputs.
Output must include evidence grades, safety flags, and clinician handoff.

steps.action: Screen inputs for protected health information and redact if found.
Apply evidence grading framework to each recommendation in the guideline.
Identify missing safety language, contraindications, or unaddressed risks.
Compile findings into a clinician review packet with unresolved questions.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read guideline documents and evidence sets.

verification.method: Check that each recommendation has an evidence level assigned.
Check that safety concerns are listed with severity.
Check that unresolved questions are listed for human review.
Confirm no protected health information appears in outputs.

success_criteria: Every recommendation in the guideline has an evidence grade.
Safety concerns and contraindications are explicitly flagged.
The output ends with a clinician handoff, not approval language.
No PHI appears in the output.

rollback.when: If PHI is detected in outputs or evidence grades are fabricated, roll back and restart with verified inputs.
